payload.note: Session 33 (2026-07-23), studio's first post-premiere serial re-check of Instance 2 (last checked 2026-07-17, per the standing monitoring-status obligation obl-enc2026002-monitoring-status). Instance 2's OPEN state held true in the world; no new confirmed confidence/denial pair. The refresh touched only the dated monitoring fields and the open-answer-slot text (monitoring.last_checked, monitoring.statement, monitoring.serial_line, disclosed, open_answer_slot.text/source_urls, answer_slot_label) — no SOURCED sentence changed, no gate re-run, no re-premiere. New event type 'object.maintained' (open string, spec 03 §3: 'Event types are open strings with a stable namespace'): distinct from 'object.transformed' because nothing was gated or re-shipped, only a live monitoring status re-dated against a first-hand world re-check — exactly the mechanism obl-enc2026002-monitoring-status commits to. The premiere-day site-gate mirror follows in evt-15.
